M1011_14_DAY_ICD_NA M1011 Inpatient Diagnosis - NA This field is checked if the patient was not discharged from an inpatient facility within the past 14 days. 0 = Not Checked (Not NA), 1 = Checked (NA) CHAR 1 x x
M1017_CHGREG_ICD1 M1017 (M0210) Regimen Change - Diagnosis1 ICD-10 Code This field lists the patient's medical diagnoses and ICD10 code 1 for those conditions requiring changed medical or treatment regimen within the past 14 days. CHAR 8 x x
